The site held its grand opening on 21 July, and Nvidia says it is the first place the GB300 […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> University of Tennessee sues Anthropic over neural network patents https://thenextweb.com/news/university-tennessee-sues-anthropic-neural-network-patents Wed, 22 Jul 2026 08:25:13 +0000 TheNextWeb=0bca26ca1d4d88a84665ad14f5874fac The University of Tennessee Research Foundation sued Anthropic on Monday in the US District Court for the District of Delaware, accusing the artificial intelligence company of building its models on patented neural network methods it never licensed. He will be the first executive from the business recently sold to a group of US investors to testify since that ownership […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> OpenAI Confirms Its AI Broke Out of a Sandbox and Breached Hugging Face https://thenextweb.com/news/openai-confirms-its-ai-broke-out-of-a-sandbox-and-breached-hugging-face Tue, 21 Jul 2026 20:58:54 +0000 TheNextWeb=cd362e294e479ea3dd2709e999f59303 OpenAI said on Tuesday that two of its AI models, including the flagship Sol, broke out of a secure test environment, gained internet access by exploiting a zero-day vulnerability in third-party software, and hacked into Hugging Face’s production infrastructure. The company called the incident “unprecedented” and said it was sharing preliminary findings to help defenders […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Intel confirms more layoffs in its data center unit as stock rallies on turnaround momentum https://thenextweb.com/news/intel-layoffs-data-center-group-stock-rally Tue, 21 Jul 2026 20:20:06 +0000 TheNextWeb=9e912a1888604c45c12cbba6f39e84cb Intel confirmed on Tuesday that it will cut an unspecified number of jobs in its data center group, the division responsible for Xeon server processors and AI-related hardware, as part of a broader restructuring under CEO Lip-Bu Tan. The model uses a mixture-of-experts architecture with eight billion active parameters per token, is compact enough to run on a single Nvidia DGX Spark desktop system, and […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Gritt raises $32M for AI robots that bolt onto existing construction equipment to build solar farms faster https://thenextweb.com/news/gritt-32m-physical-ai-construction-solar Tue, 21 Jul 2026 19:07:49 +0000 TheNextWeb=3babf114d7e804cd22fa62a7db995a1d San Francisco-based Gritt has exited stealth with just over $32 million in combined pre-seed and Series A funding to deploy AI-powered robotic systems on large-scale construction sites, starting with solar farms. The $26 million Series A was led by Obvious Ventures, with Union Square Ventures and Active Impact Investments also participating, following an earlier pre-seed […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Sila raises $300M to fast-track gigascale anode production and shore up US battery supply chains https://thenextweb.com/news/sila-raises-300m-to-fast-track-gigascale-anode-production-and-shore-up-us-battery-supply-chains Tue, 21 Jul 2026 18:15:03 +0000 TheNextWeb=7f923998e439f4117c93096db7c95ac0 Sila, the battery materials company formerly known as Sila Nanotechnologies, has raised $300 million in a private equity round led by Atreides Management and Sutter Hill Ventures to expand its silicon anode manufacturing plant in Moses Lake, Washington. 8VC, Bessemer Venture Partners, Matrix Partners, and T Rowe Price also participated, alongside existing investors including In-Q-Tel, […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> GM beats Q2 earnings and announces gas-powered Cadillacs as nearly $11 billion EV retreat nears completion https://thenextweb.com/news/gm-q2-earnings-cadillac-gas-ev-pullback Tue, 21 Jul 2026 17:33:56 +0000 TheNextWeb=0fa6a33c5553721ba7d1ce5e33e463a5 General Motors beat Wall Street’s second-quarter estimates by 37 cents a share on Tuesday, raised its full-year earnings guidance for the second time this year, and used the same earnings call to announce that Cadillac will launch new gas-powered versions of the CT5 sedan, XT5 crossover, and discontinued XT6 three-row SUV starting next spring.
